{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/anthropic-vacancies/nautilus-vs-camel/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. nautilus-vs-camel

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [00-question-camel-vs-nautilus.md|00-question-camel-vs-nautilus.md] — 
* [01-passive-vs-active-roles.md|01-passive-vs-active-roles.md] — 
* [02-what-info-repos-contain.md|02-what-info-repos-contain.md] — > [!TIP]
* [03-sgb-advocate-colleague-example.md|03-sgb-advocate-colleague-example.md] — 
* [04-what-to-take-from-info-repos.md|04-what-to-take-from-info-repos.md] — 
* [05-what-to-do-right-now.md|05-what-to-do-right-now.md] — > [!TIP]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/anthropic-vacancies/nautilus-pro2-analysis/README.md] (сходство 0.19)
* [README|docs/nautilus/community-discussions/practical-observations/README.md] (сходство 0.18)
* [README|docs/lorenzo-agent/scenarios/README.md] (сходство 0.18)
